author: chatgpt-codex-connector
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Caveat Pages for the private gift repo**

The companion blueprint makes the gift repo private, but this line presents GitHub Pages as a free gallery without the plan/visibility caveat: GitHub documents Pages for private repositories only on Pro/Team/Enterprise, and published Pages sites are public. Add either the paid/public caveat or a private alternative such as Releases/Actions artifacts for previews so the build plan doesn't depend on a feature the friend may not have ([GitHub Pages docs](https://docs.github.com/en/pages/getting-started-with-github-pages/what-is-github-pages)).

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
